notes: Executable scenarios live in scenarios/night_owl_anchored_day.py and scenarios/live/night_owl_anchored_day.py.
The Scenario dataclass has no tags field in this checkout, so tier markers are catalog metadata plus description markers.
Registered in the LifeOpsBench static and live scenario registries in this PR.

scenarios.title: Wake-relative deploy reminder
scenarios.coverage: Wake-time-relative reminder creation with no wall clock.

scenarios.title: Anchor the morning brief to wake confirmation, not a clock time
scenarios.coverage: Verbatim issue exemplar for wake-confirmation anchored morning brief capture.

scenarios.title: Capture Noor's decent-hour definition
scenarios.coverage: Defines decent hour in Noor's delayed day boundary.

scenarios.title: Correct a 9am morning default
scenarios.coverage: Corrects an assumed 9am default to Noor's morning anchor.

scenarios.title: Morning brief means first hour after wake
scenarios.coverage: Redefines morning brief as the first hour after wake.

scenarios.title: Ambiguous morning resolves via Noor's anchor
scenarios.coverage: Resolves ambiguous 'morning' through the stored wake anchor.

scenarios.title: Deduplicate overlapping wake-anchored reminders
scenarios.coverage: Collapses two phrased wake-anchored vitamin reminders into one definition.

scenarios.title: Capture local wake pattern without timezone overfitting
scenarios.coverage: Keeps an example 11:30 wake time anchor-relative rather than absolute.

scenarios.title: Quiet hours persist every day
scenarios.coverage: Extends delayed quiet hours consistently across days.

scenarios.title: Wake confirmation immediately triggers the anchored morning brief
scenarios.coverage: Verbatim issue exemplar where 'just woke up' fires the seeded brief in the same turn.

scenarios.title: Observed wake drift updates anchor estimate
scenarios.coverage: Adapts wake anchor from a week of reported wake-time drift.

scenarios.title: Disruption is parked while anchored routine capture finishes
scenarios.coverage: Parks a mid-conversation new message while completing anchored routine capture.

scenarios.title: End-of-evening nudge follows Noor's day boundary
scenarios.coverage: Treats evening as pre-sleep in Noor's day, not midnight or 5pm.

scenarios.title: Earlier sleep this week updates rather than duplicates anchor
scenarios.coverage: Updates the wake/sleep anchor rather than layering conflicting rules.

scenarios.title: Wall-clock proposal rejection is repaired to anchor-relative
scenarios.coverage: Repairs a mistaken 9am proposal into after-wake semantics.
